description: US open solar data for agents: PVWatts production, tariffs & ROI, market data, forecasts. 18 tools.
name: io.github.hoodsy/solar-data-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Free key from https://developer.nlr.gov/signup/ — required for production modeling and irradiance tools
environmentVariables.name: NREL_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Free key for URDB utility tariff lookups (economics tools)
environmentVariables.name: OPENEI_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Free key for EIA electricity price data (economics tools)
environmentVariables.name: EIA_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Optional SunSpec AHJ Registry token for permitting-authority lookups
environmentVariables.name: AHJ_REGISTRY_TOKEN

title: Solar Data
